speaker: Professional Man
text: Morning everyone. Let's keep today's standup quick. Sarah, you're up first.

speaker: Professional Woman
text: Morning. I finished the API integration yesterday. Running final tests now, should be ready to merge by noon.

speaker: Professional Woman
text: One — I need the updated credentials for the staging environment. I sent a request yesterday but haven't heard back.

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: That's on me, I'll get those to you before this call ends. Sorry for the delay.

speaker: Professional Man
text: Thanks, David. Okay, what about the dashboard redesign?

speaker: College Female
text: I've got the new layout done in Figma and shared the link in the design channel last night. I'm waiting on feedback before I hand it off to dev.

speaker: Professional Man
text: I left some comments this morning. Nothing major — mostly the colour palette on the mobile breakpoint.

speaker: College Female
text: Oh perfect, I'll take a look right after this.

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: Also, heads up — the client wants to move the demo from Thursday to Wednesday afternoon. Does that cause problems for anyone?

speaker: Professional Woman
text: I can make Wednesday work as long as the merge is done by tomorrow.

speaker: College Female
text: Same here. I just need to finalise one more screen.

speaker: Professional Man
text: Alright. Wednesday it is. I'll update the calendar invite. Good work everyone, let's have a smooth week.
